title: postsignupphpcreateanewaccount
description: Test user signup with valid data for student role, expect 201 response with session cookie and is_verified=0.

title: postloginphploginuser
description: Test user login with valid credentials, expect 200 response and session established.

title: postverifyemailphpverifyemailusingotp
description: Test email verification with valid OTP and session, expect 200 response and is_verified=1.

title: getindexphphomepagewithfeaturedpgs
description: Test home page loads successfully with featured PG listings and site hero content, expect 200 response.

title: getexplorephpsearchandfilterpgs
description: Test explore page with area, price_max, room_type filters and pagination, expect 200 response with filtered results and pagination metadata.

title: getpgdetailphpviewpgdetails
description: Test PG detail page with valid PG id, expect 200 response with PG details, gallery, room types and owner summary.

title: postuserbookingsphpmanagebookings
description: Test creating a booking with valid pg_id, room_type_id, move_in_date and booking_type, expect 201 booking created with correct status.

title: getuserchatphpmessagingwithowners
description: Test retrieving chat conversation with valid conversation_id and session, expect 200 response with conversation thread JSON.

title: postowneraddlistingphpaddnewpglisting
description: Test owner adding new PG listing with valid title, description, address, room_types JSON and photos, expect 201 listing created with status pending.

title: postadminlistingsphpapproveorrejectlistings
description: Test admin approving a pending listing with valid listing_id and admin session, expect 200 response with updated listing status and owner notified.
